\tzpentry{ID5709}{Theory It Trawin Topology Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5709 introduces Theory It Trawin Topology Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} c = \frac{1}{\sqrt{\mu_0\epsilon_0}} = 299{,}792{,}458 \text{ m/s (exact)} \end{equation}
